turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, uh,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopaedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, hey, no, this is Dana. I'm calling about some pelvic pain after a fall.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know Dana

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling on behalf of Paul or is this call for yourself?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, this is for myself.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your data first.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's March 22nd, 1979.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I need your full name.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: including your last name.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: along with your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please provide your last name?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it's Dana Whitfield.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Dana!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can help you with your pelvic pain concern.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to schedule an appointment to have it checked?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: or do you have specific questions for the clinic?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, I'd like to set up an appointment, 'cause the pain's been pretty intense since I fell.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Do you have a preferred provider you'd like to see or are you open to the first available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I'm open to the first available, yeah.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, thanks.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for the soonest available appointments for your pelvic pain.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. Bye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Actually, just so you know, I slipped in the shower 'cause, well, my belly's gotten bigger. So just keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or would you prefer to have someone from the clinic follow up with you directly?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: If you've got something sooner, that’d be great, but yeah, next week could work if that’s the earliest.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'll search for the next available appointments later next week.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, I'll wait.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: There are still...

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, just checking—did you find something for next week?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: No openings are showing for next week either.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to have someone from the clinic contact you as soon as an appointment becomes available?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that would be really helpful. Let's do that.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I'm letting the clinic know you need an appointment for pelvic pain after a fall. They'll contact you as soon as something opens up.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please hold while I record your request.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, I'll hang tight.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Your request has been sent to the clinic team.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: They'll reach out as soon as an appointment is available.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If your pain gets worse or you have trouble walking, please seek care right away.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Got it, yeah, I will. Thanks for your help.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: You're welcome.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: The clinic will reach out as soon as they have an opening.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care, Dana.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, I appreciate it. Talk soon.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Talk soon. Dana. Wishing you a quick recovery.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Thanks, appreciate it. Bye.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Bye, Dina!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Take care.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: You too, bye now.
